name: Brightwing
description: A Healer who can teleport to allies, excelling on large battlegrounds.
title: Faerie Dragon
info: Like many faerie dragons, Brightwing is happiest darting around the forests of Ashenvale, healing friends, and then grabbing a light snack. By the way, did you know a human head only weighs ten pounds? Talk about light!

Brightwing.name: Arcane Flare
Brightwing.description: Shoot a flare dealing 75 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit, and an additional 105 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the center. If a Hero is hit by the center, Soothing Mist's passive healing instantly activates.

Brightwing.name: Polymorph
Brightwing.description: Polymorph a target for 1.5 seconds, Slowing their Movement Speed by 30% and Silencing them. Targets are not able to attack while Polymorphed.

Brightwing.name: Pixie Dust
Brightwing.description: Increase target Hero's Movement Speed by 20%, and grant them 30 Spell Armor for 3 seconds, reducing Spell damage taken by 30%.

Brightwing.name: Blink Heal
Brightwing.description: Teleport to a nearby ally. When teleporting to a Hero, heal them for 200 (+4% per level).  Stores up to 2 charges.

Brightwing.name: Emerald Wind
Brightwing.description: After 0.5 seconds, create an expanding nova of wind, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage and pushing enemies away.

Brightwing.name: Soothing Mist
Brightwing.description: Activate to remove all Stun, Root, Slow, and Silence effects from nearby allied Heroes.  Passive: Brightwing heals nearby allied Heroes for 110 (+4% per level) every 4 seconds

Brightwing.name: Phase Shift
Brightwing.description: After 2 seconds, teleport to an allied Hero and heal them for 25% of their maximum Health.

1.name: Greater Polymorph
1.description: Passive: Increase Polymorph's range by 30%.  If Brightwing hits an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center within 2 seconds of being Polymorphed, then reduce Polymorph's cooldown by 7 seconds and gain 50 Mana.

1.name: Hyper Shift
1.description: Increase Phase Shift's healing by an additional 4% of the target's maximum Health. Nearby enemy Minion deaths reduce Phase Shift's cooldown by 0.5 second.

1.name: Pixie Charm
1.description: Activate to consume 20 stacks of Bribe to instantly defeat an uncaptured non-Elite Mercenary.  Passive: Gain 1 stack of Bribe when a nearby enemy Minion dies, and 5 stacks when hitting an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center. Maximum 80 stacks.

4.name: Dream Shot
4.description: Increase Arcane Flare's range by 60%. Hitting a Hero with Arcane Flare's center reduces its cooldown to 2 seconds.

4.name: Unstable Anomaly
4.description: Increase Polymorph's Slow by 15%. Upon expiration, Polymorph deals damage to nearby enemy Heroes equal to 2% of their maximum Health.

4.name: Magic Spit
4.description: Increase Basic Attack range by 1.1. Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Soothing Mist by 4 seconds.

7.name: Sticky Flare
7.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Arcane Flare have their Movement Speed Slowed by 20% for 3 seconds. Increase the Slow to 40% if they are hit by the center portion.

7.name: Peekaboo!
7.description: Phase Shifting to an ally grants both Brightwing and her target a 335 (+4% per level) Shield for 4 seconds and reveals a large area around them for 5 seconds.

7.name: Critical Mist
7.description: Soothing Mist heals allied Heroes for 165 (+4% per level). Increase this healing by 140% if Soothing Mist removed a disabling effect from that ally.

10.name: Blink Heal
10.description: Teleport to a nearby ally. When teleporting to a Hero, heal them for 200 (+4% per level).  Stores up to 2 charges.

10.name: Emerald Wind
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, create an expanding nova of wind, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage and pushing enemies away.

13.name: Pixie Boost
13.description: Increase Pixie Dust's Movement Speed bonus to 50%, decaying to 20% over 3 seconds.

13.name: Safety Dust
13.description: Increase Pixie Dust's duration by 1 second. Soothing Mist and Blink Heal heal allies with an active Pixie Dust for 75% more.

13.name: Pixie Power
13.description: Reduce the cooldown of Pixie Dust by 3 seconds and increase the Spell Armor granted by 25.

16.name: Hush!
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by the center of Arcane Flare are Silenced for 1 second and deal 25% less damage for 3 seconds.

16.name: Critterize
16.description: While Polymorphed, the target's Armor is reduced by 25, increasing the damage they take by 25%.

16.name: Phase Out
16.description: Activate to place Brightwing in Stasis for 0.75 seconds.

20.name: Invisible Friends
20.description: Blink Heal grants Stealth to Brightwing and her Heroic targets for 9 seconds, and they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. While Stealthed by Invisible Friends, Heroes heal for 25 (+4% per level) health per second.  Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

20.name: Intensive Winds
20.description: Permanently reduce Emerald Wind's cooldown to 5 seconds.

20.name: Speedy Dragon
20.description: Permanently gain 20% Movement Speed. Reduce Phase Shift's cast time by 1 second.

20.name: Faerie Protector
20.description: Activate to apply Pixie Dust to all nearby Heroes.  Passive: Pixie Dust always bounces back and applies to Brightwing.

tooltipMarkup.BrightwingArcaneFlare: Shoot a flare dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArcaneFlareOuterDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies hit, and an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArcaneFlareInnerDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in the center. If a Hero is hit by the center, Soothing Mist's passive healing instantly activates.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingArcaneFlareHush!: Enemy Heroes hit by the center of Arcane Flare are Silenced for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingArcaneFlareHushSilence,Duration"/></c> second and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,BrightwingArcaneFlareHushDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> less damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingArcaneFlareHushDamageReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingArcaneFlareStickyFlareTalent: Enemy Heroes hit by Arcane Flare have their Movement Speed Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,BrightwingStickyFlareOuterSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingStickyFlareOuterSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds. Increase the Slow to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,BrightwingStickyFlareInnerSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> if they are hit by the center portion.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingBlinkHealAllyDash: Teleport to a nearby ally. When teleporting to a Hero, heal them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BlinkHealInitialHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FaerieDragonBlinkHealDash,Cost[0].Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingCalmingMistCriticalMist: Soothing Mist heals allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingCalmingMistCriticalMistCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>. Increase this healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingCalmingMistCriticalMistCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[TargetCC].Modifier*100"/>%</c> if Soothing Mist removed a disabling effect from that ally.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingDreamShotTalent: Increase Arcane Flare's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,BrightwingDreamShotArcaneFlare,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,FaerieDragonArcaneFlare,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>. Hitting a Hero with Arcane Flare's center reduces its cooldown to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingArcaneFlareDreamShotInner,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingEmeraldWind: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FaerieDragonEmeraldWind,CastIntroTime" precision="1"/></c> seconds, create an expanding nova of wind, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,EmeraldWindDamage,Amount[0]"/> </c>damage and pushing enemies away.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingEmeraldWindIntensiveWinds: Permanently reduce Emerald Wind's cooldown to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FaerieDragonEmeraldWind,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse+Talent,BrightwingIntensiveWinds,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingFaerieProtector: Activate to apply Pixie Dust to all nearby Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Pixie Dust always bounces back and applies to Brightwing.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingGreaterPolymorphTalent: <c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Polymorph's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,BrightwingGreaterPolymorphPolymorph,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,FaerieDragonPolymorph,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>. <n/><n/>If Brightwing hits an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPolymorphGreaterPolymorphTalentMarker,Duration"/></c> seconds of being Polymorphed, then reduce Polymorph's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,BrightwingPolymorphGreaterPolymorphRefundCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds and gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingPolymorphGreaterPolymorphCreateManaHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingInvisibleFriends: Blink Heal grants Stealth to Brightwing and her Heroic targets for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingInvisibleFriendsCloak,Duration"/></c> seconds, and they are Unrevealable for the first <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingInvisibleFriendsUnrevealableCloak,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds. While Stealthed by Invisible Friends, Heroes heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingBlinkHealInvisibleFriendsCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> health per second.<n/><n/>Remaining stationary for at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HeroGenericStationaryExtraStealthCountdown,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingMagicSpit: Increase Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,BrightwingMagicSpit,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" precision="1"/></c>. Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Soothing Mist by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,BrightwingCalmingMistMagicSpitModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPhaseOut: Activate to place Brightwing in Stasis for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPhaseOutStasis,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPhaseShift: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,BrightwingPhaseShift,CastIntroTime" player="0"/></c> seconds, teleport to an allied Hero and heal them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,BrightwingPhaseShiftCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"player="0"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPhaseShiftHyperShift: Increase Phase Shift's healing by an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Talent,BrightwingPhaseShiftHyperShift,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)" precision="2"player="0"/>%</c> of the target's maximum Health. Nearby enemy Minion deaths reduce Phase Shift's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,BrightwingPhaseShiftHyperShiftModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPhaseShiftPeekaboo: Phase Shifting to an ally grants both Brightwing and her target a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPhaseShiftPhaseShieldBuff,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPhaseShiftPhaseShieldBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds and reveals a large area around them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingPhaseShiftPeekabooCreatePersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,BrightwingPhaseShiftPeekabooCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPixieBoostTalent: Increase Pixie Dust's Movement Speed bonus to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,BrightwingPixieDustMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Talent,BrightwingPixieBoostPixieDust,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)*100" player="0"/>%</c>, decaying to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPixieDustMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" player="0"/>%</c> over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPixieDustMoveSpeedBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPixieDust: Increase target Hero's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,BrightwingPixieDustMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c>, and grant them <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPixieDustSpellArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"player="0"/></c> Spell Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPixieDustSpellArmorBehavior,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds, reducing Spell damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPixieDustSpellArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPixieDustPixiePower: Reduce the cooldown of Pixie Dust by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,BrightwingPixieDustPixiePower,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and increase the Spell Armor granted by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,BrightwingPixieDustPixiePower,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"player="0"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPixieDustSafetyDust: Increase Pixie Dust's duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,BrightwingPixieDustSafetyDust,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second. Soothing Mist and Blink Heal heal allies with an active Pixie Dust for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,BrightwingSoothingMistCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[SafetyDust].Modifier"/>%</c> more.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPolymorph: Polymorph a target for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPolymorph,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, Slowing their Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPolymorphSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"player="0"/>%</c> and Silencing them. Targets are not able to attack while Polymorphed.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingPolymorphCritterizeTalent: While Polymorphed, the target's Armor is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPolymorphCritterizeArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus*(-1)"/></c>, increasing the damage they take by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingPolymorphCritterizeArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus*(-1)"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingSoothingMistCalmingMist: Activate to remove all Stun, Root, Slow, and Silence effects from nearby allied Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Brightwing heals nearby allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingSoothingMistCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BrightwingSoothingMistCooldown,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingSpeedyDragon: Permanently gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,BrightwingSpeedyDragonMoveSpeedBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed. Reduce Phase Shift's cast time by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Talent,BrightwingSpeedyDragon,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.BrightwingUnstableAnomalyTalent: Increase Polymorph's Slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*(Talent,BrightwingUnstableAnomalyPolymorph,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)"player="0"/>%</c>. Upon expiration, Polymorph deals damage to nearby enemy Heroes equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,BrightwingPolymorphUnstableAnomalyDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.FaerieDragonPixieCharmTalent: Activate to consume <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FaerieDragonPixieCharmSubtractTokenCount,Value*(-1)"/></c> stacks of Bribe to instantly defeat an uncaptured non-Elite Mercenary.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> stack of Bribe when a nearby enemy Minion dies, and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,BrightwingPixieCharmAddHeroTokenCount,Value"/></c> stacks when hitting an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center. Maximum <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FaerieDragonPixieCharm,Max"/></c> stacks.
